src: Pokedex - a Kotlin Multiplatform app, built with Compose multiplatform, Coroutines, Flow, Koin, Ktor, SqlDelight, Decompose, MVIKotlin, and Material 3 based on MVI architecture
ja: Pokedex — Compose Multiplatform、Coroutines、Flow、Koin、Ktor、SqlDelight、Decompose、MVIKotlin、Material 3を使いMVIアーキテクチャで構築したKotlin Multiplatformアプリ
